title: Section 3
content: On such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint, the undertaking of the Commission shall stand transferred to, and vest in, the Corporation.
footnote: 1. 1st February, 1994, vide notification No. G.S.R. 44(E), dated 28th January 1994, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part I, sec. 3(i)
